item.title: Woman treats this man like dirt…
item.description: She disrespects and mistreats him in a way no one should ever tolerate.

media:content.media:description: She disrespects and mistreats him in a way no one should ever tolerate.

item.title: Men are no longer approaching…
item.description: Why more men are pulling back and no longer making the first move in dating.

media:content.media:title: Men are no longer approaching…
media:content.media:description: Why more men are pulling back and no longer making the first move in dating.

item.title: He treated her like a queen and she broke up with him…
item.description: He gave her love, effort, and respect, but she still chose to walk away.

media:content.media:title: He treated her like a queen and she broke up with him…
media:content.media:description: He gave her love, effort, and respect, but she still chose to walk away.

item.description: A real and honest discussion about modern dating from both the male and female perspective.

media:content.media:description: A real and honest discussion about modern dating from both the male and female perspective.

item.title: This man needs to RUN…
item.description: This situation is packed with warning signs and he seriously needs to get out fast.

item.description: This man finally sees the red flags and realizes exactly what’s going on.

item.title: Super Hungry Guys Are Super Attractive!
item.description: There’s something undeniably attractive about a man who shows up with full energy.

item.title: Men Don't Need Women, But They Need Peace
item.description: For many men, peace matters more than love when it comes to relationships.

media:content.media:description: For many men, peace matters more than love when it comes to relationships.
